content.json:
# Netskope Web Transactions
---
This workbook provides comprehensive visibility into web traffic monitored by Netskope, including user activity, application usage, traffic patterns, threat protection, endpoint posture, process activity, identity, and security insights.

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(CsUsername) and CsUsername != "-"
| summarize 
    Transactions = count(),
    UniqueApps = dcount(XCsApp),
    UniqueHosts = dcount(CsHost),
    TotalBytes = sum(Bytes)
    by User = CsUsername
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Top 20 Active Users

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(CsUsername) and CsUsername != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by User = CsUsername
| order by Transactions desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 Users by Transactions

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCsApp) and XCsApp != "-"
| summarize 
    Transactions = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(CsUsername),
    TotalBytes = sum(Bytes)
    by Application = XCsApp
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Top 20 Applications

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCategory) and XCategory != "-"
| summarize 
    Transactions = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(CsUsername),
    TotalBytes = sum(Bytes)
    by Category = XCategory
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Top 20 Web Categories

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCsApp) and XCsApp != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by Application = XCsApp
| order by Transactions desc
| take 10
content.title: Application Distribution

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCategory) and XCategory != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by Category = XCategory
| order by Transactions desc
| take 10
content.title: Category Distribution

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCCountry) and XCCountry != "-"
| summarize 
    Transactions = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(CsUsername)
    by SourceCountry = XCCountry
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Traffic by Source Country

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XSCountry) and XSCountry != "-"
| summarize 
    Transactions = count(),
    UniqueHosts = dcount(CsHost)
    by DestCountry = XSCountry
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Traffic by Destination Country

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCLocation) and XCLocation != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by Location = XCLocation
| order by Transactions desc
| take 15
content.title: Top Source Locations

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XSLocation) and XSLocation != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by Location = XSLocation
| order by Transactions desc
| take 15
content.title: Top Destination Locations

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ScStatus > 0
| summarize Transactions = count() by StatusCode = tostring(ScStatus)
| extend StatusCategory = case(
    toint(StatusCode) >= 200 and toint(StatusCode) < 300, "2xx Success",
    toint(StatusCode) >= 300 and toint(StatusCode) < 400, "3xx Redirect",
    toint(StatusCode) >= 400 and toint(StatusCode) < 500, "4xx Client Error",
    toint(StatusCode) >= 500 and toint(StatusCode) < 600, "5xx Server Error",
    "Other")
| order by Transactions desc
content.title: HTTP Status Codes

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(CsMethod) and CsMethod != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by Method = CsMethod
| order by Transactions desc
content.title: HTTP Methods Distribution

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ScStatus >= 400
| extend StatusCategory = iff(ScStatus >= 500, "5xx Server Error", "4xx Client Error")
| summarize Errors = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), StatusCategory
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: HTTP Errors Over Time

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCOs) and XCOs != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by OS = XCOs
| order by Transactions desc
| take 10
content.title: Operating Systems

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCBrowser) and XCBrowser != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by Browser = XCBrowser
| order by Transactions desc
| take 10
content.title: Browsers

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCDevice) and XCDevice != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by Device = XCDevice
| order by Transactions desc
| take 10
content.title: Device Types

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCsTrafficType) and XCsTrafficType != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by TrafficType = XCsTrafficType
| order by Transactions desc
content.title: Traffic Types

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XPolicyAction) and XPolicyAction != "-"
| summarize 
    Count = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(CsUsername)
    by PolicyAction = XPolicyAction, PolicyName = XPolicyName
| order by Count desc
| take 20
content.title: Policy Actions

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XTpMalwareName) and XTpMalwareName != "-"
| summarize 
    Detections = count(),
    AffectedUsers = dcount(CsUsername),
    AffectedHosts = dcount(CsHost)
    by Malware = XTpMalwareName, Severity = XTpSeverity, Engine = XTpEngine
| order by Detections desc
| take 20
content.title: Malware Detections

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XTpSeverity) and XTpSeverity != "-"
| summarize Detections = count() by Severity = XTpSeverity
| order by Detections desc
content.title: Threat Severity Distribution

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XTpResult) and XTpResult != "-"
| summarize Count = count() by Result = XTpResult, Engine = XTpEngine
| order by Count desc
| take 20
content.title: Threat Protection Results by Engine

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCDeviceClassification) and XCDeviceClassification != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by DeviceClassification = XCDeviceClassification
| order by Transactions desc
content.title: Device Classification

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCOsFamily) and XCOsFamily != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by OSFamily = XCOsFamily
| order by Transactions desc
| take 10
content.title: OS Family

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCNsclientVersion) and XCNsclientVersion != "-"
| summarize Devices = dcount(XCDeviceUid) by ClientVersion = XCNsclientVersion
| order by Devices desc
| take 10
content.title: Netskope Client Versions

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCsProcess) and XCsProcess != "-"
| summarize 
    Transactions = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(CsUsername),
    UniqueHosts = dcount(CsHost)
    by Process = XCsProcess
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Processes

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCsParentProcess) and XCsParentProcess != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by ParentProcess = XCsParentProcess
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Parent Processes

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCAuthnUser) and XCAuthnUser != "-"
| summarize 
    Transactions = count(),
    UniqueApps = dcount(XCsApp)
    by AuthUser = XCAuthnUser, AuthSource = XCAuthnSource
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Authenticated Users

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCAuthzGroups) and XCAuthzGroups != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count(), UniqueUsers = dcount(CsUsername) by Group = XCAuthzGroups
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Authorization Groups

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XAction) and XAction != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by Action = XAction
| order by Transactions desc
content.title: Actions Distribution

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XActionReason) and XActionReason != "-"
| summarize Count = count() by ActionReason = XActionReason, Action = XAction
| order by Count desc
| take 20
content.title: Action Reasons

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XRCountry) and XRCountry != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count(), UniqueHosts = dcount(CsHost) by RemoteCountry = XRCountry
| order by Transactions desc
| take 20
content.title: Traffic by Remote Destination Country

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(CsHost) and CsHost != "-"
| summarize 
    Transactions = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(CsUsername),
    TotalBytes = sum(Bytes)
    by Host = CsHost
| order by Transactions desc
| take 25
content.title: Top 25 Destination Hosts

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(CsHost) and CsHost != "-"
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(Bytes) by Host = CsHost
| order by TotalBytes desc
| take 10
content.title: Top Hosts by Data Volume

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XCsAccessMethod) and XCsAccessMethod != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by AccessMethod = XCsAccessMethod
| order by Transactions desc
content.title: Access Methods

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(CsUriScheme) and CsUriScheme != "-"
| summarize Transactions = count() by Scheme = CsUriScheme
| order by Transactions desc
content.title: URI Schemes (HTTP vs HTTPS)

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    User = CsUsername,
    SourceIP = CIp,
    Method = CsMethod,
    Host = CsHost,
    URI = CsUri,
    StatusCode = ScStatus,
    Application = XCsApp,
    Category = XCategory,
    BytesIn = CsBytes,
    BytesOut = ScBytes,
    SourceCountry = XCCountry,
    DestCountry = XSCountry,
    PolicyAction = XPolicyAction
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 500
content.title: Recent Transactions (Last 500)

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XServerSslErr) and XServerSslErr != "None" and XServerSslErr != "-"
| summarize 
    ErrorCount = count(),
    AffectedUsers = dcount(CsUsername),
    AffectedHosts = dcount(CsHost)
    by SSLError = XServerSslErr
| order by ErrorCount desc
content.title: Server SSL Errors

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(XClientSslErr) and XClientSslErr != "None" and XClientSslErr != "-"
| summarize 
    ErrorCount = count(),
    AffectedUsers = dcount(CsUsername)
    by SSLError = XClientSslErr
| order by ErrorCount desc
content.title: Client SSL Errors

content.query:
NetskopeWebTransactions_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where XSslBypass == "yes"
| summarize 
    BypassCount = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(CsUsername)
    by BypassReason = XSslBypassReason, Host = CsHost
| order by BypassCount desc
| take 20
content.title: SSL Bypass Events
Duplicate Transaction Percentage
Duplicate Analysis Details
